# netbox_vlan (Data Source)

Fetches a VLAN from NetBox by VID and optionally name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `vid` (Number) The VLAN ID to look up.

### Optional

- `name` (String) The name of the VLAN to look up (optional for disambiguation).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the VLAN.
- `group` (Number) The VLAN group ID.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the VLAN.
- `status` (String) The status of the VLAN.
- `tenant` (Number) The tenant ID associated with this VLAN.
